sections.paragraph:
ἀναντιρρήτως (also ἀναντιρήτως w. one ρ as in OGI 335, 138 [II/I b.c.]) adv. of ἀναντίρρητος, in NT only in act. mng. (Polyb. 22, 8, 11; pap; Job 33:13 Sym.) without raising any objection ἔρχεσθαι Ac 10:29.

OGI OGI = Orientis Graeci Inscriptiones Selectae—List 3

adv. adv. = adverb, adverbially

NT NT = New Testament

act. act. = active

mng. mng. = meaning(s)

Polyb Polyb , III–II b.c.—List 5

pap pap = papyrus, -yri

Sym. Sym. = Symmachus, Greek version of the OT—List 2, beg., 5

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 69
